_note: Airline stopover program terms change; confirm current rules and visa requirements before relying on this for trip planning.

programs.freeHotelHours: Available for layovers roughly 4-96 hours; free or discounted hotel packages via Discover Qatar depending on fare class.
programs.visaNote: Most nationalities (including Indian passport holders with a valid visa for a country like US/UK/Schengen/etc., and many others outright) get free visa-on-arrival for stays up to 96 hours.
programs.shortLayover: 8h: Souq Waqif, Museum of Islamic Art, Corniche waterfront walk.
programs.midLayover: 24h: Add The Pearl-Qatar, desert safari (half-day), Katara Cultural Village.
programs.longLayover: 48h: Full desert safari + overnight, National Museum of Qatar, Doha Corniche by night.
programs.airportTransport: Hamad International Airport to city center: ~20-30 min by taxi/Karwa, metro (Doha Metro Red Line) available.

programs.freeHotelHours: Free hotel stay for connections of roughly 20-24 hours on eligible international-to-international itineraries (business class often 1-2 nights, economy typically 1 night).
programs.visaNote: Indian passport holders generally need a Turkish e-Visa in advance even for a stopover if leaving the airport; check current rules before travel.
programs.shortLayover: 6h: Touristanbul free guided tour (Sultanahmet area) if offered on your itinerary; otherwise airport lounge + Istanbul Airport shopping.
programs.midLayover: 24h: Hagia Sophia, Blue Mosque, Grand Bazaar, Bosphorus ferry.
programs.longLayover: 48h: Add a Bosphorus cruise, Topkapi Palace, and a Turkish hamam experience.
programs.airportTransport: Istanbul Airport (IST) to city center: ~35-50 min via Havaist bus or metro (M11) + M2 line.

programs.programName: My Emirates Pass / Dubai Stopover packages
programs.freeHotelHours: No free hotel by default, but discounted stopover hotel + attraction packages can be booked at checkout for layovers of 12h+.
programs.visaNote: Indian passport holders (with valid US/UK/EU visa or Green Card) get visa-on-arrival; otherwise a UAE visa can be arranged in advance.
programs.shortLayover: 8h: Dubai Mall + Burj Khalifa 'At the Top', Dubai Fountain show.
programs.midLayover: 24h: Add Old Dubai / Al Fahidi + abra ride across Dubai Creek, Gold & Spice Souks.
programs.longLayover: 48h: Add a desert safari, Palm Jumeirah, Museum of the Future.
programs.airportTransport: Dubai International (DXB) to Downtown Dubai: ~20 min via Dubai Metro Red Line or taxi.

programs.freeHotelHours: Discounted stopover hotel packages for layovers 12h+; occasional free-night promos for premium fares.
programs.visaNote: Similar UAE visa-on-arrival rules as Dubai for eligible passport/visa holders.
programs.shortLayover: 8h: Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, Corniche waterfront.
programs.midLayover: 24h: Add Louvre Abu Dhabi, Yas Island (Ferrari World or Yas Waterworld).
programs.longLayover: 48h: Full Yas Island day + Qasr Al Watan palace + mangrove kayaking.
programs.airportTransport: Abu Dhabi International (AUH) to city center: ~25-30 min by taxi/bus.

programs.freeHotelHours: Paid stopover holiday packages (hotel + tours) bookable for layovers of 6h+; no free-night program currently.
programs.visaNote: Indian passport holders can use Singapore's visa-free/e-visa transit provisions for short stays; check current ICA rules.
programs.shortLayover: 6-8h: Jewel Changi (Rain Vortex), Gardens by the Bay light show.
programs.midLayover: 24h: Add Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, Chinatown, hawker food trail.
programs.longLayover: 48h: Add Sentosa Island, Universal Studios Singapore.
programs.airportTransport: Changi Airport to Marina Bay: ~20-25 min via MRT or taxi.
